ruleBaseline: Grabbed, Grappled, and Pinned are distinct states. Grabbed/Grappled restrict movement and impose -2 to most attacks; Pinned prevents actions and removes Dexterity bonus to Reflex.
currentEvidence: scripts/combat/systems/grappling-system.js:56-60 checks Grabber/Entangler talents for grab penalty relief instead of Pin/Trip feats.
scripts/combat/systems/grappling-system.js:225-249 applies -5 Reflex to Grabbed/Grappled.
scripts/combat/systems/grappling-system.js:253-260 applies -10 Reflex and condition track override 5 to Pinned.
automationBoundary: automate deterministic state flags and roll math; GM/player may still confirm targets and narrative positioning

ruleBaseline: Evasion modifies area attack damage for each defender: half damage on hit, no damage on miss; it does not apply to Burst Fire.
currentEvidence: Evasion metadata claims existing runtime through enhanced-rolls.
scripts/sheets/v2/character-sheet.js:7342-7390 routes canonical combat attacks through SWSERoll.rollAttack.
scripts/combat/rolls/enhanced-rolls.js:643-651 checks Evasion on actor.items, which is the attacker in that function, not the target.
scripts/combat/rolls/enhanced-rolls.js:670-676 gives half damage on missed Burst Fire.
automationBoundary: automate damage outcome math once GM/table identifies affected targets; do not automate template placement

ruleBaseline: Aim/Charge-gated feats should activate only when the attack context actually includes aim or charge.
currentEvidence: scripts/engine/combat/combat-option-resolver.js requires context.aim/context.charge for Careful Shot, Deadeye, Powerful Charge, and Charging Fire.
scripts/rolls/roll-config.js:1130-1147 returns situational.aiming/situational.charging and a flat situationalBonus instead of top-level aim/charge.
automationBoundary: automate math/context; GM manages legality of LoS/path/terrain

ruleBaseline: Some actions require compound costs such as swift+standard or two swift actions.
currentEvidence: data/combat-actions.json:102-119 models Autofire as swift + standard.
data/combat-actions.json:122-130 models Brace as 2 swift actions with cost 2.
scripts/sheets/v2/character-sheet.js derives a single economy type and checks cost before action type.
automationBoundary: automate action budget spending; leave tactical legality to GM

ruleBaseline: Shooting or throwing into melee applies -5 unless the attacker has Precise Shot.
currentEvidence: scripts/engine/combat/combat-option-resolver.js models Precise Shot as suppressing firingIntoMeleePenalty.
scripts/combat/rolls/attacks.js computeAttackBonus does not visibly add firingIntoMeleePenalty.
automationBoundary: assist: player/GM can mark target as in melee; automate penalty/suppression once marked

ruleBaseline: Burst Fire should be represented consistently as the correct attack/action type for SWSE rules and local project interpretation.
currentEvidence: data/combat-actions.json:133-153 models Burst Fire as standard.
data/feat-combat-actions.json:550-558 models Burst Fire as full-round.
automationBoundary: automate chosen action cost once source of truth is decided

ruleBaseline: Damage must know whether the originating attack was critical, area, burst fire, rapid shot/strike, stun, charge, etc.
currentEvidence: scripts/combat/rolls/damage.js:294-300 suppresses crit multiplication for area attacks only if area context reaches damage.
There are multiple weapon damage paths: scripts/combat/rolls/attacks.js and scripts/combat/rolls/damage.js.
automationBoundary: automate deterministic damage math; GM decides affected targets/area inclusion

ruleBaseline: Stun damage has special half-HP, pre-halved threshold, immunity, and unconsciousness rules.
currentEvidence: data/combat-actions.json:762-773 includes Switch Weapon Mode as a swift action reminder.
DamageResolutionEngine accepts damageType stun for threshold evaluation, but full stun-specific behavior was not proven in Phase 0A.
automationBoundary: automate target type immunity and damage/CT math once weapon mode is known
